is_active.description: Whether studio is active and validated

email_confirmations_enabled.description: Whether booking confirmation emails are enabled

reminder_minutes_before.description: Minutes before appointment to send reminder

reminder_secondary_enabled.description: Whether secondary reminder emails are enabled

reminder_secondary_minutes_before.description: Minutes before appointment to send the secondary reminder

booking_confirmation_subject_template.description: Optional subject template for booking confirmation emails

booking_confirmation_body_template.description: Optional plain-text body template for booking confirmation emails

booking_reminder_subject_template.description: Optional subject template for booking reminder emails

booking_reminder_body_template.description: Optional plain-text body template for booking reminder emails

booking_reminder_secondary_subject_templ.description: Optional subject template for secondary reminder emails

booking_reminder_secondary_body_template.description: Optional plain-text body template for secondary reminder emails

followup_quick_enabled.description: Whether quick follow-up emails are enabled

followup_quick_minutes_after.description: Minutes after appointment to send quick follow-up

booking_followup_quick_subject_template.description: Optional subject template for quick follow-up emails

booking_followup_quick_body_template.description: Optional plain-text body template for quick follow-up emails

followup_longterm_enabled.description: Whether long-term follow-up emails are enabled

followup_longterm_minutes_after.description: Minutes after appointment to send long-term follow-up

booking_followup_longterm_subject_templa.description: Optional subject template for long-term follow-up emails

booking_followup_longterm_body_template.description: Optional plain-text body template for long-term follow-up emails

booking_page_disclaimer_template.description: Customizable disclaimer/policy text shown on the public booking page

calendar_view_start_hour.description: First hour shown on the internal calendar (0-23)

calendar_view_end_hour.description: Last hour shown on the internal calendar (1-24, exclusive end)
